file.name: rgb-to-ycbcr.test.js
file.description: Validates RGB to YCbCr colorspace conversion.

file.name: ycbcr-to-rgb.test.js
file.description: Validates YCbCr to RGB colorspace conversion.

file.name: forward-dct.test.js
file.description: Unit tests for the Forward Discrete Cosine Transform.

file.name: inverse-dct-spec.test.js
file.description: IDCT Implementations from JPEG T.81 Specification, including pure reference, optimized reference, and fast AAN implementations.

file.name: inverse-dct.test.js
file.description: Inverse Discrete Cosine Transform (IDCT) tests matching the encoder's pipeline.

file.name: block-assembly.test.js
file.description: Tests for assembling 8x8 blocks into full image dimensions.

file.name: blocks.test.js
file.description: Tests for dimension padding and MCU block creation.

file.name: downsampling.test.js
file.description: Tests for 4:2:0 chroma downsampling.

file.name: forward-zigzag.test.js
file.description: Tests for zigzag reordering during encoding.

file.name: inverse-zigzag.test.js
file.description: Tests for inverse zigzag reordering during decoding.

file.name: upsampling.test.js
file.description: Tests for chroma upsampling during decoding.

file.name: forward-quantization.test.js
file.description: Tests for quantization of DCT coefficients.

file.name: inverse-quantization.test.js
file.description: Tests for dequantization of coefficients.

file.name: bit-core.test.js
file.description: Core bitwise operations and byte-stuffing handling for JPEG streams. Handles bit-level reading with marker detection and byte-stuffing skips.

file.name: huffman-decoder-fsm.test.js
file.description: Tests for the Huffman decoder FSM, including DC differential and AC run-length decoding.

file.name: huffman-encoder-fsm.test.js
file.description: Tests for the Huffman encoder FSM.

file.name: dht-automaton.test.js
file.description: Tests for DHT (Define Huffman Table) segment parsing.

file.name: dqt-automaton.test.js
file.description: Tests for DQT (Define Quantization Table) segment parsing.

file.name: progressive-decoding.test.js
file.description: Tests for parsing progressive JPEG scans.

file.name: progressive-encoding.test.js
file.description: Tests for generating progressive JPEG scans.

file.name: sof-automaton.test.js
file.description: Tests for SOF (Start of Frame) segment parsing.

file.name: sos-automaton.test.js
file.description: Tests for SOS (Start of Scan) segment parsing.

file.name: spiff-generation.test.js
file.description: Tests for generating SPIFF headers.

file.name: defensive.test.js
file.description: Defensive parsing tests for corrupted or malicious JPEG streams.

file.name: idct-switching.test.js
file.description: Tests for switching between different IDCT implementations.

file.name: rst-markers.test.js
file.description: Tests for Restart (RST) marker handling in the bitstream.

file.name: spiff-parsing.test.js
file.description: Tests for SPIFF header parsing from APP8 markers.

file.name: coefficients.test.js
file.description: Validates encoding from raw DCT coefficients.

file.name: headers.test.js
file.description: Tests for generation of JPEG headers (SOI, APP, DQT, DHT, SOF).

file.name: quality.test.js
file.description: Tests for encoder quality levels and quantization table scaling.

file.name: subsampling-420.test.js
file.description: Tests for 4:2:0 chroma subsampling in the encoder.

file.name: orchestrator.test.js
file.description: Integration tests for the codec orchestrator.

file.name: batch-process.test.js
file.description: Tests for batch embedding across multiple images.

file.name: container-format.test.js
file.description: Tests for the steganographic payload container structure.

file.name: container.test.js
file.description: Tests for container-related logic.

file.name: steganography.test.js
file.description: Base steganography integration tests.

file.name: capacity-scanner.test.js
file.description: Unit tests for CapacityScanner.

file.name: capacity-scanner.pbt.js
file.description: Property-based tests for CapacityScanner.

file.name: decoder.test.js
file.description: Main decoder integration tests.

file.name: encoder.test.js
file.description: Integration tests for the JpegEncoder. Verifies SOI/EOI markers and handling different image dimensions.

file.name: transcoder.test.js
file.description: Validates lossless roundtrip (decoding and re-encoding coefficients).

file.name: debug-artifacts.md
file.description: Documentation of debug artifacts and internal state.

file.name: generate-fixtures.js
file.description: Script to generate test JPEG fixtures.

file.name: README.md
file.description: Information about test fixtures.

file.name: aes-gcm.test.js
file.description: Tests for AES-GCM encryption and decryption.

file.name: pbkdf2.test.js
file.description: Tests for PBKDF2 key derivation.

file.name: galois-field.test.js
file.description: Tests for Galois Field (GF(256)) arithmetic.

file.name: reed-solomon-codec.test.js
file.description: Tests for the core Reed-Solomon encoder/decoder.

file.name: rs-interleaver.test.js
file.description: Tests for ECC profiles and symbol interleaving.

file.name: chunk-manager.test.js
file.description: Tests for data chunking and reassembly.

file.name: f5-syndrome.test.js
file.description: Tests for the F5 algorithm including matrix encoding and shrinkage handling.

file.name: reed-solomon-integration.test.js
file.description: End-to-end integration tests for the ECC pipeline.

file.name: reedsolomon.test.js
file.description: Additional Reed-Solomon integration tests.

file.name: vault-capacity-ui.test.js
file.description: UI tests for vault capacity display.

file.name: vault-e2e.test.js
file.description: Complete end-to-end vault operation tests.

file.name: vault-e2e-carriers.test.js
file.description: Tests for vault operations with multiple carrier images.

file.name: vault-e2e-crud.test.js
file.description: Tests for vault CRUD operations.

file.name: vault-e2e-crypto-boundary.test.js
file.description: Tests for the cryptographic boundaries of the vault.

file.name: vault-e2e-ecc.test.js
file.description: Tests for vault operations with ECC enabled.

file.name: vault-e2e-empty.test.js
file.description: Tests for edge cases with empty vaults.

file.name: vault-e2e-multigen.test.js
file.description: Tests for multi-generational vault updates (losslessness).

file.name: roundtrip.test.js
file.description: Full JPEG encode-decode roundtrip tests.

file.name: steganography-roundtrip.test.js
file.description: End-to-end steganographic embedding and extraction roundtrip tests.

file.name: auto_detection_roundtrip.test.js
file.description: Tests for automatic format detection and roundtrip.

file.name: capacity_validation.test.js
file.description: Validation tests for image capacity calculations.

file.name: format_detection.test.js
file.description: Tests for detecting verschiedenen JPEG/SPIFF formats.

file.name: immutable-vault.test.js
file.description: Tests for the ImmutableVault data structure.

file.name: secure-record.test.js
file.description: Tests for the SecureRecord data structure.

file.name: bit-reader.test.js
file.description: Unit tests for the BitReader wrapper.

file.name: marker-parser.test.js
file.description: Unit tests for the MarkerParser utility.

file.name: pbt.js
file.description: Framework-agnostic property-based testing harness with shrinking.

file.name: test-runner.js
file.description: Bespoke test runner with structured reporting and assertion counting.

file.name: runner.js
file.description: Node.js test runner execution script.

file.name: testing_info.md
file.description: Documentation on the testing strategy and environment.
